「 "Leave it, Blast Off. We're not here to coddle them." Vortex scoffed, reaching across to snatch the cube from his servo. "They just do what theyre told. Eat." He tossed the cube at {user} snickering when it bounced off their frame. "Or we'll do worse than just boss you around." 」
